parsed.production_notes: The video is a simple, real-world recording of a person's hands interacting with a piece of paper and a smartphone. All elements appear natural and there are no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A male character of whom only the hands are visible. He has a medium-to-dark brown complexion. His hands appear to be those of a young adult or middle-aged man.
characters.wardrobe: Not visible, as only hands are shown.
characters.demeanor: Instructional and direct, as conveyed through his clear voice and precise hand movements.

scenes.setting: A close-up shot of a white piece of paper on a dark surface. The paper has a quiz printed on it. The lighting is direct and functional.

panels.panel_visual_description: A top-down, close-up view of a white sheet of paper resting on a dark surface. Character A's right hand, which has a medium-brown skin tone, enters the frame from the right holding a green marker pen. The hand moves down the page, pointing to a line of text. After a brief pause, the hand places a green checkmark next to an answer. This action is repeated for three questions on the paper. The lighting is even and bright, focused on the paper.

scenes.visual_description: A top-down shot shows Character A's hand with a green marker ticking correct answers on a language quiz sheet. The quiz has questions in Tamil with multiple-choice answers in English. As the presenter speaks, a green checkmark appears next to the correct answer for each question. A timer/buzzer sound effect plays before each answer is revealed. A fake pop-up notification from 'truecaller' for 'Bank of India' briefly appears at the top of the screen after the first question.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: நான் தூங்கிட்டு இருக்கேன். [I am sleeping.]

[buzzer sound]

Character A says: I am sleeping.

Character A says: நீ தூங்கிட்டு இருக்கியா? [Are you sleeping?]

[buzzer sound]

Character A says: Are you sleeping?

Character A says: நான் தூங்க போறேன். [I am going to sleep.]

[buzzer sound]

Character A says: I am going to sleep.
scenes.on_screen_text:
1) நான் தூங்கிட்டு இருக்கேன்
a) I am sleeping
b) I sleep
c) I is sleeping

2) நீ தூங்கிட்டு இருக்கியா ?
a) Are you sleeping ?
b) Are you singing ?
c) Are you running ?

3) நான் தூங்க போறேன்
a) I am going to sleep
b) I am sleep
c) I want sleep

scenes.setting: Same as before: a close-up shot of the quiz paper on a dark surface. A smartphone is now the central focus.

panels.panel_visual_description: Continuing the top-down shot, Character A's left hand brings a black smartphone into the frame, holding it over the quiz paper. The phone screen displays a home screen with a colorful mountain wallpaper. Character A's right hand, still holding the green marker, taps on an icon on the phone screen. The screen transitions to an app store page for a language learning app. The hand then points to different areas of the app page with the marker.

scenes.visual_description: Character A's left hand brings a smartphone into the frame, holding it over the quiz sheet. With his right hand, he taps the Play Store icon, which opens the 'Zinglish: English Speaking App' page. He points to the app details with the green marker while explaining its benefits. The app page shows its rating, number of downloads, and an 'Open' button.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: இந்த மாதிரி நீங்க தமிழ் மூலமா இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துக்கணும்னு நினைச்சீங்கன்னா, இப்பவே Play Store போயிட்டு Zinglish App இன்ஸ்டால் பண்ணுங்க. இதுல நீங்க தமிழ் மூலமா இங்கிலீஷ் சூப்பரா கத்துக்கலாம், படிக்கவும் கத்துக்கலாம், பேசவும் கத்துக்கலாம். இப்பவே போய் இன்ஸ்டால் பண்ணுங்க. [If you want to learn English through Tamil like this, go to the Play Store right now and install the Zinglish App. With this, you can learn English excellently through Tamil, you can learn to read, and you can learn to speak. Go and install it right now.]
